<par>At the synchronic level, the Laze word has no initial, just one rhyme that forms a syllable by itself. But at the diachronic level, it seems to be the result of the same development that yields an initial <latinform>/v/</latinform> in <latinform>/vie/</latinform> "do": occlusive lenition.
